svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="AE2Lsw5j0io0O9Xwf8H7" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=40;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;container=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Layer 3: Multi-Agent Claude Code Engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="960" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-ops" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="homelab-ops" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="30" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-dev" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="dev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="190" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-research" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="research" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="350" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-writer" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="writer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="510" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-security" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="security" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="670" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-memsync" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="memory-sync
(PM2 cron, 4 AM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="110" x="820" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-lbl" parent="l3" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=2;fontSize=10;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;" value="Shared Memory Infrastructure" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="30" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-memsearch" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="memsearch
(session recall)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="30" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-graphiti" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="Graphiti
(knowledge graph)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="205" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-ctx" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="context repo
(distilled, git-backed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="380" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-cc" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="core-context.md
(always-visible, 40-line cap)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="195" x="565" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3-qmd-stdio" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="qmd (stdio)
(MCP doc search)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="785" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=40;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;container=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Layer 2: Self-Hosted Service Stack (Docker)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="185" width="960" x="40" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-swag" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="SWAG
(reverse proxy, SSL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-authelia" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="Authelia
(SSO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="195" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-librechat" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="LibreChat
(chat UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="360" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-searxng" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="SearXNG
(web search)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="525" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-dockhand" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="Dockhand
(container mgmt)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="690" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-qmd" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="qmd HTTP
(RAG, port 8181)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="140" x="195" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-opennotebook" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="Open Notebook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="140" x="360" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2-graphiti-svc" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="Graphiti MCP
(Neo4j-backed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="140" x="525" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=40;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;container=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="Layer 1: Host & Core Tooling" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="185" width="960" x="40" y="575" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-claude" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Desktop
(GUI, MCP host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-mcp" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;align=left;" value="MCP Servers
Netdata · Grafana · GitHub
Unraid · TrueNAS · InfluxDB
Bluesky · Playwright · DC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="220" x="200" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-guac" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Guacamole
(remote GUI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="445" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-pm2" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="PM2
(service manager)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="615" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-claudecode" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Code
(agent runtime)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="145" x="785" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1-os" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffd8a8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Debian Linux · NVMe storage · Docker Engine · NFS mounts (optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="30" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-l3-l2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="l2" value="uses services"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-l2-l1" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="l1" value="runs on"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
